questions.text: Which of the following best describes the function of Amazon FSx?
options: It gives you visibility and control of your infrastructure on AWS.
It makes it easy and cost effective to launch and run popular file systems.
It gives you the ability to set custom budgets that alert you when your costs or usage exceed your budgeted amount.
It allows you to explore AWS services and create an estimate for the cost of your use cases.
questions.explanation: Amazon FSx makes it easy and cost effective to launch and run popular file systems.

questions.text: Which AWS service enables a company to store data that is rarely accessed and has a retrieval time of hours?
questions.explanation: Amazon S3 Glacier is a secure, durable, and extremely low-cost Amazon S3 storage class for data archiving, which is why it is used to store data that is rarely accessed and has a retrieval time of hours.

questions.text: When asked about the key characteristic of Amazon S3 Glacier, which statement is true?
options: It enables you to manage access to AWS services and resources securely.
It helps you protect secrets needed to access your applications.
It is a secure, durable, and extremely low-cost Amazon S3 storage class for data archiving.
It is a fully managed messaging service for both application-to-application (A2A) and application-to-person (A2P) communication.
questions.explanation: Amazon S3 Glacier is known for the fact that it is a secure, durable, and extremely low-cost Amazon S3 storage class for data archiving.

questions.text: A developer is looking for an AWS service that allows them to archive long-term regulatory records. Which service should they select?
questions.explanation: Amazon S3 Glacier is designed to archive long-term regulatory records.

questions.text: Which of the following best describes the function of AWS Snowball?
options: It is a petabyte-scale data transport solution using secure devices.
It is a service for building conversational interfaces into any application using voice and text.
It is a fully managed messaging service for both application-to-application (A2A) and application-to-person (A2P) communication.
It connects VPCs and on-premises networks through a central hub.
questions.explanation: AWS Snowball is a petabyte-scale data transport solution using secure devices.

questions.text: Which AWS service is defined as a service that 'provides object storage built to store and retrieve any amount of data'?
questions.explanation: By definition, Amazon S3 provides object storage built to store and retrieve any amount of data.

questions.text: Which AWS service enables a company to run native Windows file systems (SMB)?
questions.explanation: Amazon FSx makes it easy and cost effective to launch and run popular file systems, which is why it is used to run native Windows file systems (SMB).

questions.text: A company needs a solution to run a relational database on EC2 that needs block storage. Which AWS service should they choose?
questions.explanation: For the requirement to run a relational database on EC2 that needs block storage, Amazon EBS is the best choice because it provides persistent block storage volumes for use with EC2 instances.

questions.text: A developer is looking for an AWS service that allows them to share files across multiple EC2 Linux instances concurrently. Which service should they select?
questions.explanation: Amazon EFS is designed to share files across multiple EC2 Linux instances concurrently.

questions.text: Which AWS service enables a company to run high-performance Lustre file systems for machine learning?
questions.explanation: Amazon FSx makes it easy and cost effective to launch and run popular file systems, which is why it is used to run high-performance Lustre file systems for machine learning.
